data.title: Add --auto mode gate bypass blocks to architect-foundation SKILL.md
data.description:
testing_mode: GREEN
depends_on: d016-c2f9 (Task 1)

Files: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md, .test-index

Add 4 bypass blocks and update the --auto Mode summary section.

BYPASS BLOCK FORMAT (use for all 4):
**In --auto mode:** Skip [description]. Log: Auto-mode selected; [specific action taken].

LOCATIONS (add bypass block immediately before or after the user-confirmation text):

1. Phase 2 Validation Loop (around line 132):
   After: 'Do not proceed to Phase 3 until the user explicitly approves.'
   Bypass: Skip user confirmation. Accept blueprint as generated. Log: Auto-mode selected; bypassing Phase 2 Validation Loop.

2. Phase 2.5 Recommendation Synthesis (around line 154):
   After: 'Allow the user to accept, reject, or discuss each recommendation individually before proceeding to the next.'
   Bypass: Accept all synthesized recommendations without interactive review. Log: Auto-mode selected; accepting all N recommendations.

3. Phase 2.75 Batched Artifact Review (around line 181, single confirmation step):
   After: Single confirmation step 'Proceed with writing all N files?'
   Bypass: Skip file-write confirmation. Write all enforcement artifacts immediately. Log: Auto-mode selected; writing all N enforcement artifacts.

4. Phase 3 Step 0 prefill-config confirmation (around line 290):
   After: 'confirm the written values with the user before proceeding to Step 1'
   Bypass: Skip post-prefill-config confirmation. Proceed to Step 1 using values written by prefill-config.sh. Log: Auto-mode selected; bypassing prefill-config confirmation.

5. Update ## --auto Mode section (lines 30-38) to enumerate all 4 bypassed gates:
   Add references to Phase 2, Phase 2.5, Phase 2.75, and Phase 3 Step 0.75.

Remove 5 RED marker lines from .test-index (all [test_auto_bypass_*] and [test_auto_mode_*] entries).

Acceptance Criteria:
1. awk '/^## Phase 2:/,/^## Phase 2\.5:/' SKILL.md | grep -q 'In --auto mode' exits 0
2. awk '/^## Phase 2\.5:/,/^## Phase 2\.75:/' SKILL.md | grep -q 'In --auto mode' exits 0
3. awk '/^## Phase 2\.75:/,/^## Phase 2\.8:/' SKILL.md | grep -q 'In --auto mode' exits 0
4. awk '/^### Step 0:/,/^### Step 1:/' SKILL.md | grep -q 'In --auto mode' exits 0
5. awk '/^## --auto Mode/,/^## Workflow Overview/' SKILL.md | grep -c 'Phase 2' returns >= 4
6. grep -q 'Does this blueprint meet your enforcement requirements' SKILL.md exits 0 (interactive path preserved)
7. grep -q 'Present each recommendation one at a time' SKILL.md exits 0 (interactive path preserved)
8. grep -cE 'Log:.*[Aa]uto.mode|[Aa]uto.mode.*[Ll]og' SKILL.md returns >= 4 (DD2 compliance)
9. All 5 RED markers removed from .test-index
10. bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (all 5 tests GREEN)
